name: release-package
description: SDLC release-packaging phase: collect the commit range, generate CHANGELOG.md and release-notes.md fragments under the mission evidence dir. Pure shell-driven — the resulting markdown files land in active/missions/<id>/evidence/ and can be reviewed before the RELEASE_READY gate flips.

params.cmd:
printf '# Release Notes — %s

## Summary

_Fill in after review._

## Changes

' '{{project_name}}' > {{output_dir}}/release-notes.md && cat {{output_dir}}/commit-range.txt >> {{output_dir}}/release-notes.md && printf '
## Upgrade Steps

_Fill in after review._

## Known Issues

_Fill in after review._
' >> {{output_dir}}/release-notes.md

params.message: Release package drafted for {{project_name}} ({{from_ref}}..{{to_ref}}) — CHANGELOG.md and release-notes.md at {{output_dir}}
